top_signals.title: South Africa’s Kganyago Warns Inflation Expectations Are Rising
top_signals.summary: South Africa’s central bank governor said policymakers are seeing early signs of second-round inflation effects as underlying price pressures build, emphasizing the need to act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert
top_signals.summary: Workers from tech industries receive bonus worth millions of won, prompting the Bank of Korea to warn of the upward pressure to inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Energy Security, Not Climate Goals, Is Now Driving the Clean Power Boom
top_signals.summary: While ships are beginning to trickle through the Strait of Hormuz after months of near-total closure, it will be a very long time before the effects of this year’s energy crisis fade from the global economy – if they ever do. This latest round of turmoil in global oil and gas markets has catalyzed clean energy adoption to a degree that may permanently alter the global energy landscape, as well as the way that we conceive of energy security and geopolitical strategy. It is extremely telling that, against the backdrop of the United States…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
top_signals.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
